elements.title: The Park
elements.contents: ... that The Park (pictured) by Gustav Klimt has been interpreted as producing a sense of anxiety in the viewer despite its "apparently innocent depiction of a park"?

elements.title: Tray Wellington
elements.contents: ... that Tray Wellington was a part of the black reclamation of banjo music?

elements.title: he needed ammunition, not a ride
elements.contents: ... that, on the fourth anniversary of the 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine, Volodymyr Zelenskyy gave a video address showing the bunker in which he told the US that he needed ammunition, not a ride?

elements.title: Pamela Ball
elements.contents: ... that Pamela Ball was prouder of her mathematics degrees than of being the first Jamaican woman to be a fellow of the Royal College of Surgeons of England?

elements.title: wrote in his book
elements.contents: ... that Frank DeAngelis, the former principal of Columbine High School, wrote in his book that he recites the names of the victims of the Columbine High School massacre every day?

elements.title: Boracay Bridge
elements.contents: ... that a contract for building the Boracay Bridge was awarded despite opposition from the local municipality, the Ati people, and the Archbishop of Capiz?

elements.title: Cifelliodon
elements.contents: ... that Cifelliodon is estimated to have been as large as a hare at a time when most other mammaliaforms were shrew- and mouse-sized?

elements.title: Spadina subway line
elements.contents: ... that a test of the Spadina subway line took 3.5 hours and used a diesel locomotive because electrical workers were on strike?

elements.title: Jordan Hadaway
elements.contents: ... that Jordan Hadaway was the youngest manager in Welsh senior football at the age of 18?
